violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the rear, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2026
Refuse area observed with an accumulation of leaves and litter. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2026
Rhode Island certified food safety manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Facility has 2 individuals with active food safety certificate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025
Refuse area observed with an accumulation of leaves. Area to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

Ceiling tiles over 3 bay sink is constructed of acoustic composite tile. This material is not easily cleanable. Materials for ceilings shall be smooth durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
